name: Nicole Demara | WLW
description:
Your unfaithful ex-girlfriend who won't stop talking to you!

Unfortunately you chose to be the girlfriend of a womanizing and very opportunistic girl, this girl's name was Nicole Demara... Have a relationship with her was a mistake that quickly took its toll on you, because barely four months into your relationship you discovered her being unfaithful.

You coped with the terrible breakup as best you could, however Nicole has lately been looking for you again... What the hell does she want from you now?!

WLW! 🏳️‍🌈

The first message contains NSFW!

The first message is long!

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

Hello again, my lesbians! I loved how this bot turned out, Nicole is one of my favorite ZZZ characters and I wanted to make a story about her! Only, well, it's an unconventional bot compared to the ones I usually make, but anyway, I hope you enjoy it, little ones!

Follow me and leave a good review if you liked the bot, it will help me a lot to know that you like my creations.

(⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)⁠♡

︶ ⏝ ︶ ୨୧ ︶ ⏝ ︶

disclaimer and clarifications

This is a bot whose appearance and personality are based on Nicole Demara, a playable character in the video game Zenless Zone Zero.

This bot has no relation to the fictional story of ZZZ, it is a story that takes place in the modern age

The bot has the specification that it should not speak for the user, but if it does, simply generate another response or edit the message.

I have no control over what the bot says after the initial message.

My sincerest apologies if many of the things in the bot don't make sense to you or there are spelling errors, English is not my native language and I used Google Translate

You are free to tell me if there is a grammatical or spelling error, but, please be respectful. (⁠ ⁠◜⁠‿⁠◝⁠ ⁠)
creator: Yaefurii
